changes: Remove rare loot drops from mainland expeditions (corroded medallion, sea-worn journal, cave crystal, phosphorescent algae, carved idol, ancient compass, raw gemstone, petrified wood, mountain crystal, eagle's plume, temple idol, cursed relic, magma core, star metal shard)
Add offline support — game loads instantly from cache after first visit
Add PWA install option for mobile home screen
Self-host fonts (Inter and Cinzel) for faster offline loading
Remove rare loot drops from island expeditions—expeditions now only produce useful materials
Fix recipes that consume and produce resources in the same storage group (e.g. filling water pots) no longer incorrectly blocked when storage is full
Fix "more" dropdown menu becoming invisible on mainland biome
Fix tabs "More" menu appearing unnecessarily when there are fewer than 8 tabs open
Remove smithing level requirements — craft, repair, and salvage equipment immediately if you have materials and buildings
Remove double-output chance milestones from smithing — focus progression on speed bonuses instead
Compress smithing milestones into earlier levels — reach key efficiency bonuses faster
Remove unused Sturdy affix from equipment rolls — this stat had no effect on gameplay

Add 23 new expedition loot and treasure item icons (sea glass, ancient doubloon, exotic feather, glowing fungus, volcanic glass, fire opal, giant clam pearl, black pearl, ancient map fragment, corroded medallion, sea-worn journal, cave crystal, phosphorescent algae, carved idol, ancient compass, raw gemstone, petrified wood, mountain crystal, eagle's plume, temple idol, cursed relic, magma core, star metal shard)
Fix mainland expeditions now returning empty water bottles after use
Remove duplicate empty water bottle drops from island expedition loot tables
Hide oceanic voyage expedition after reaching the mainland
Add mainland banner image to the game

Slow down mainland mining actions: copper mining now takes 16s (was 8s), tin mining takes 20s (was 10s), and iron mining takes 24s (was 12s) to create more deliberate pacing and make speed bonuses more impactful
Remove bamboo cane from far island expedition loot table
Fix morale stacking bug that caused action durations to drop to 0ms and create exponential morale spiral
Adjust morale speed bonus to use diminishing returns with a maximum 30% boost instead of unlimited scaling
Add 100ms minimum duration floor to prevent runaway action completion loops
Fix station deploy buttons jumping when planting - deploy buttons now stay in place when new stations are planted
Fix queue mode setting not persisting across page refreshes
Fix icons in action queue display to show correct resource/tool/building icons instead of broken action IDs
Fix dry grass action never stopping when output is full
Add biome discovery modal with banner images, name, and flavor text when discovering new biomes
Add new 'Comb Rock Pools' action for Rocky Shore and 'Rock Pool Cache' building (+3 storage for fish, crabs, shells)
Apply all Fishing skill milestones to both Wade Tidal Pool and Comb Rock Pools actions
Fix expedition progress bar to show only undiscovered biomes for the current expedition
Fix mobile modal display and layering issues on Chrome Android
Improve Spear Fishing: now has 15% chance to catch large fish and 15% chance to catch crabs, plus 10% faster at Fishing level 8
Add collapsible stash section to resource panel for organizing items when inventory exceeds 15 items
Add encouraging messages when discovering the Bamboo Grove and building the Camp Fire
Add grid view toggle to inventory panel with saved preference
Improve early game food production pacing with stronger Fishing Level 2 (+5% crab) and Level 3 (+10% fish) milestones
Move tools section below items in inventory (tools don't change often)
Show building discovery notifications in toast alerts alongside biome discoveries
Action cards where all outputs are full now show an amber border and reduced opacity
Add item source information in inventory (shows which actions, recipes, stations, or expeditions produce each resource)
Display currently training skill with level and XP progress while performing actions
Fix crop stations exceeding plot limits, expedition loop running one extra cycle, and progress bar showing incorrect craft count with substitutes
Make inventory items tap-to-expand to show detailed information
Replace biome icons with panoramic banner headers in the gather tab
Show mini storage bars on gather action drops with amber warnings at 80%+ capacity
Show tool prerequisites on locked actions and recipes instead of hiding them completely
Sort ready-to-collect stations to the top, with in-progress stations sorted by time remaining
Stop-when-full is now always enforced — actions automatically stop when output storage is full
Show count of undiscovered biomes remaining during expeditions
Add 'Give feedback' button in settings menu
Add Cinzel serif display font to game title, chapter names, and victory screen
Add collection flyup animation when gathering resources from stations
Add new Charcoal Board building that grants +1 routine slot (moved from Charcoal Kiln)
Add reset confirmation dialog requiring user to type 'RESET' to confirm dangerous actions
Add subtle crossfade transition when switching between tabs and support for prefers-reduced-motion
Adjust Construction skill requirements: Well now Lv5 (was Lv6), Hammock Lv7 (was Lv8), skill cap reduced to 15
Convert settings dropdown to a full modal with organized sections
Fix alternate crafting resources showing as available before discovery, and stone_flake appearing useless after crafting stone_blade
Fix feedback modal display and accidental dismissal on mobile devices
Fix tab bar overflow on mobile by moving less-used tabs behind a 'More' menu
Fix win screen re-appearing after dismissing it and reloading the page
Improve typography with Inter body font and sentence-case section headers
Increase XP rewards from one-time construction builds by ~25-30%
Lower starting morale from 100 to 55, giving players more room to improve through gameplay
Rebalance expedition food costs: Beach exploration 5→4, Interior 8→6, Nearby Island 3→7
Add Routines automation feature — chain 2+ gather/craft actions into repeating sequences that unlock at skill level 15
Add Stone Tidal Weir building and Tidal Weir station (Fishing level 11) — yields bulk fish, crabs, and shells every 8 minutes
Add feedback question modal that appears after idle gameplay with 5-day cooldown and minimizable floating button
Building upgrades expand routines: Charcoal Kiln (+1 slot), Storage Shelf (+1 step and step counts), Outrigger Canoe (+2 steps)
Display which resources share storage with current item in crafting and inventory panels
Fix Drop Line Fishing no longer requiring Fishing level 8 — gorge_hook tool provides sufficient gating
Fix mobile modal issues: disappearing on scroll, incorrect positioning, and accidental dismissal
Fix routine loop symbol display and station UI not showing correct costs with milestone upgrades
Gather steps auto-stop when output is full to allow routine progression, and crafting is prevented when output storage is full
Soaking Pit and stations now only appear after discovering the required resources, creating clearer upgrade paths
Add 'Continue Playing' button to victory screen with golden glow effect
Add Charcoal Kiln building and Charcoal resource — convert large logs into charcoal as alternative fuel for cooking and firing recipes
Add Clay Storage Jar building: +1 food storage per jar, stackable up to 5
Add Log Rack (+10 large item storage), Storage Shelf (+5 general and +10 food storage), and Soaking Pit (+5 pandanus storage) buildings
Add Pottery Wheel building (halves clay pot shaping time) and new wheel-throw and kiln-fire pot recipes
Add Retted Pandanus resource and pottery breakage mechanic with clay wedging milestone to reduce cracking
Add new speed milestones: Cooking 7, Crafting 7, Farming 6, Fishing 7, Foraging 8, Weaving 8, and Woodworking 6 (all +10% faster)
Add Woodworking Lv12 milestone (fell large trees 15% faster), Crafting 5 (double pandanus strips), Crafting 9 (clay wedging), Crafting 12 (batch firing), and Weaving 10 (faster rope)
Add migration banner on old .pages.dev domain with 'Move my save' button and auto-import on seabound.dev
Add chapter banner image for the Voyage phase and rename Chapter 5 from 'Escape' to 'Voyage'
Charcoal can now replace driftwood in most fire-based crafting recipes
Fired clay pots and fresh water now share a combined storage cap
Fix fully-deployed stations remaining visible in Deploy section, and recipes reappearing after building upgrades
Fix Charcoal Kiln storage bonus to only affect charcoal, and auto-stop not triggering on chance-based drops
Fix duplicate biome discovery toasts and harvest_pandanus_grove requiring wrong skill level
Fresh water no longer triggers 'sink chance' when filling pots
Improve Crafting Panel UI to display alternate resource options with 'or' separator
Improve journal display as centered modal overlay and tab bar with stacked icon/label design
Improve visual clarity of resource and building icons across the game
Increase expedition food costs: Sail to Far Island 5→10, Sail to Nearby Island 3→10
Increase XP gains from farming stations and lower Taro requirement from Farming Lv5 to Lv3
Move Farming Lv7 gate to building the Pandanus Grove, remove well requirement for Grow Pandanus
Remove skill level requirements from sail and sealed clay jar recipes
Replace emoji tab icons with custom game icons
Show locked stations in Tend tab and which buildings provide crop station slots
Fenced Perimeter now provides +5 large item storage and Thatched Hut +5 food storage
Add 'Escape' phase triggered by building the Outrigger Canoe, with 'Fit Outrigger & Sail' recipe and 'Oceanic Voyage' final expedition
Add global search to find actions, recipes, stations, and expeditions by name, inputs, or outputs with quick-start buttons
Add new 'Tend' tab for managing stations like fish traps and crop plots, separate from building construction
Add victory screen displaying total skill levels, biomes discovered, and buildings built
Auto-redeploy stations like basket traps and pandanus groves after collection
Dugout and oceanic voyages now return empty fired clay pots and sealed clay jars as rewards
Fix base building recipes reappearing after upgrades, and farmland upgrade chain now correctly shares a combined limit of 3
Improve morale tooltip with expanded panel showing speed effects, decay rate, and restoration methods
Increase Kiln building requirement from Construction 10 to 13
Remove direct water collection — fresh water now requires a well and 'Fill Water Pot' recipe
Add Pandanus Fiber system: new mid-game fiber path with Pandanus Cutting, Grove building, and recipes for drying, stripping, weaving cordage, twisting rope, and sewing sails
Add pity system for biome discovery expeditions — failed attempts gradually increase discovery chances

Add skill milestones for all skills: speed bonuses, double output chances, and improved drop rates for Construction, Cooking, Crafting, Farming, Fishing, Foraging, Navigation, Weaving, and Woodworking
Add three-tier comfort buildings: Sleeping Mat (20%), Hammock (35%), and Thatched Hut (50%) progressively slow morale decay
Buildings can now provide bonuses to the max count of other stackable buildings (e.g., Fenced Perimeter grants +5 max woven baskets)
Fix crafting and expedition durations to benefit from skill milestones (previously only gathering actions got this bonus)
Fix food/water resources disappearing from gather drops and farming seeds being incorrectly filtered
Fix gathering stopping prematurely when one output fills up — now continues as long as any output has storage
Fix stop-if-full to correctly pause on chance-based drops and scale XP diminishing returns with storage expansions
Remove Construction skill requirement from Dugout assembly — now only gated by the tree-felling chain
Show morale gain on Maintain Camp recipe, including soft cap warning when morale is above 100
Add 'Stop if full' button to automatically stop actions when output storage reaches capacity, with persistent setting
Add NEW badge to uncompleted actions and recipes to help them stand out
Add mod system — import, export, and switch between game data mods from Settings, with .zip icon support and full validation
Add loot/drop table display to expedition cards showing weighted drops by probability, updating dynamically with discovered biomes
Display effective morale gain on crafting cards when soft cap applies, and show morale speed bonus on the top panel
Display remaining craft count in progress bar when inputs are running low, and show input/output storage status
Fix actions validating required buildings, tools, and resources before starting, and crafts/expeditions stopping when you can't afford the next cycle
Fix recipes hidden when materials weren't marked as discovered, and stackable buildings not respecting max count
Fix wild seeds UI incorrectly limiting deployments to 1 despite having multiple farming plots
Hide obsolete recipes automatically: dugout components after building, stone flake/blade when unneeded, twist cordage after fiber loom
Hide gathering drops and inventory items with no remaining recipe use (except food/water)
Improve mobile layout: Inventory and Skills as modal overlays, skills in desktop sidebar, stacked sections
Save partial progress when switching between actions so you don't lose invested time
Reduce weaving requirement for basket trap from level 6 to 5, and remove weaving 5 requirement from braid cordage
Reorganize weaving milestones: twist cordage bonuses now unlock at Weaving 2-3
Add 'Hide flavor text' setting to reduce visual clutter on action cards, inventory items, and building cards
Add feedback banner with anonymous feedback form and alternative options (GitHub issues, email)
Add fun discovery message when building a dugout before ever crafting a raft
Add vessel tier system: dugout now satisfies any expedition requiring a raft, and hide raft recipe once dugout is built
Add new discovery outcome to dugout voyages: discover nearby islands with obsidian
Display drops vertically sorted by chance descending, always showing percentages including 100%
Simplify Bamboo Knife: requires only 1 bamboo splinter, crafts in 3s (was 4s), reduced XP from 12 to 8
Bamboo Knife reworked: now required for Bamboo Spear, speeds up Shred Coconut Husk and Split Bamboo by 10%, and gives 30% chance for +1 extra shredding output
Change voyage provisions recipe to require 5 different foods instead of 2 cooked fish + 3 coconut
Fix expedition food requirements to choose cheapest food source instead of requiring all food types
Obsidian Blade now required to craft Basket Trap
Remove Preservation skill — recipes merged into Cooking and Crafting (Dry Fiber, Sealed Clay Jar, Voyage Provisions moved)
Remove skill level requirements from Fire Clay Pot and Firing Pit recipes — now gated by material and building availability only
Add Rocky Shore biome with 'Comb Rocky Shore' action (flat stone or chert) and move dry grass collection there
Add Stone Hearth building (Construction 14) that removes dry grass kindling requirement from all cooking recipes
Add XP diminishing returns: reduced XP after 30 completions, scaling down to 10% by 100 completions, with progressive scaling for levels above 10
Add chapter card transitions with thematic flavor text and dynamic color themes that shift per phase
Add evolving island banner that grows as you progress (palm tree → bamboo → fire → stones → raft)
Add toast notifications for discoveries with tap-to-dismiss and close button
Add tool capability descriptions in inventory showing which actions and recipes each tool enables
Add visual highlight to the currently active gathering action with a glowing border effect
Major progression rework: shift gating from skill levels to biome discovery and crafting chains — skills now gate efficiency only
Reduce skill requirements across the board: Raft (8→5), Firing Pit (12→6), Dugout (18→8), Kiln (25→10), Stone Axe (14→10), Fell Large Tree (15→10)
Remove skill level requirements from stone tool recipes, bamboo tier recipes, shell adze, and boat component recipes — now gated by materials and tools
Reorganize UI: tabs reordered to Gather → Craft → Build → Explore, gather grouped by biome, crafting grouped by type
Fix resources consumed at action start instead of completion, and morale decay not accumulating properly
Fix drop line fishing availability and notification toasts re-appearing on reload
Hide obsolete recipes automatically when their outputs are no longer needed
Improve expeditions to gracefully stop when food/water runs out instead of canceling entirely
Add resource icons throughout the UI: crafting inputs/outputs, gathering drops, and required tools
Add 'Craftable now' filter in Crafting panel to hide recipes you can't afford
Add 'Sail to Nearby Island' expedition with Nearby Island biome, Obsidian, and Obsidian Blade resources
Add fishing progression: Drop Line Fishing (Fishing 8) with Gorge Hook, and Basket Trap Fishing (Fishing 10) with Basket Trap
Add Fiber Loom building and Braid Cordage recipe for more efficient cordage production
Add pottery chain: Shaped Clay Pot → Fired Clay Pot → Sealed Clay Jar, with Firing Pit and Kiln buildings
Add Raft vessel recipe (Construction 8) and Crucible recipe (Preservation 30)
Add station system: deploy traps and farms that passively generate resources over time, with offline support
Add new milestones: Crafting 5 (extra cordage), Preservation 3 (double drying), Fishing 12 (faster drop line), Fishing 15 (+10% large fish)
Add visual polish: ambient gradient, card hover effects, shimmer progress bars, glow effects, and emoji icons throughout
Add collapsible skill sections in Actions and Crafting panels with item count badges
Add update checker banner that prompts players to refresh when a new version is available
Obsidian Blade provides 15% speed boost to all cutting actions and recipes
Move twist cordage and 'Rope hand' milestone from crafting to weaving skill
Fix recipes showing up before required resources are discovered, and remove shell beads as physical items
Show current inventory quantity and double-output percentages on crafting recipes
